star_1.text: Jim, I really do appreciate you for trying to create a high quality mobile experience, but I have a feeling that this game is restricted by itself, being a reimagining of the website version for a mobile friendly level-based structure that unfortunately is flawed in key areas: 1. Certain graphical and sound effects are unnecessary additions or sound/look off. 2. Physics are stiffer and less weighty than on desktop. 3. No option for usermade levels hurts the replayability. 4. Way too many ads...

Tried playing it while travelling without access to WiFi, the game asks you to reconnect for ads and if you can't locks you out. The constant invasive ads that you can't click away from without being taken to a page you didn't ask to visit is annoying but at least common practice now. Being kicked out of the app if you don't have internet is a new level of insufferable.

the old man level (lvl no.2) doesn't really work,it keeps crashing whenever I'm in the air,and also, there's no creator made levels, the developers beg you to turn on your wifi like hungry dogs,and moped levels are nonexistent. PLEASE FIX THIS. p.s. add more characters

the levels are just plain annoying (and no, i'm not simply bad at gaming, i play happy wheels nearly everyday, the pc version tho) with usually way too many obstacles, which frequently makes the game unenjoyable, and sometimes the level doesn't even provide enough context as to what you're supposed to do to pass an obstacle, which forces you to have to go through an excessive amount of trial and error which, if you didn't know, isn't fun, even after you figure it out. good ideas. poor execution.

How is this Happy Wheels? The computer version had so much more compared to the mobile version. You can't play levels made by people, it's extremely hard to make levels, and not to mention the amount of unwanted and stupid ads. Fancy Gaming had already screwed up the gameplay on PC like how it's so laggy, and now we are forced to play this? Comedy!

As of right now, I hate the app It's completely worse because when we want no ads we switch of the wi-fi or mobile data so we can play the game more peacefully. But you force to turn on the data or ELSE you kick us out of the app. You could make in game purchases available but I see you haven't done it. Having in game purchases is much better than kicking you out for not switching on the data. Another thing is the level creator. This is the best part of the game. You still haven't added it.

I would LOVE this game if it wasn't for the ads. I know, you need money because it's a free game. But turning off your wifi doesn't work. And I don't want to watch ads every time I die. This game is worser than the original Happy Wheels on computer. I would NOT suggest this unless your up for wasting money.

I don't have a clue why the mobile version have a limit of characters,but PC have santa and irresponsible mom.and when I don't use internet it says 'i will consider it' I press that button then it freezes for about 7 seconds then sends me of the game.and why do iOS have all the better stuff? Creating levels, leaderboards , but on Android all you do is play levels made by the creator. Please add more characters for mobile and creator mode for Android.

It sucks that this game is loaded with ads but the IOS version is not. They are treating us like peasants. The worst part is that when you turn off your Wifi or you don't have access to it. The game begs you to turn it back on. Really? It does not even give a option to disregard the message, when you select I'll consider it, the game crashes. 😠 Meaning everytime you have to restart it or watch non stop ads. Utter rubbish choice of, rather make it a optional thing like revive at checkpoint

I'd give this a 4, because of the ads, but even ehwn you turn off internet to bypass the ads, the game pesters into turning yout internet on. And when you press the button, IT CRASHES YOUR GAME. So your options are to either, turn internet on and suffer through the ads, or turn it off and still get pestered more than the ads themselves. IF YOU WANT MONEY, JUST MAKE THE GAME PREMIUM SO PEOPLE WOULD HAVE TO BUY IT TO GET THA GAME. The game itself is fun, but the devs have ruined it.

Ah yes, close the game after detecting that I can't be spammed with 500 ads on a game with like 15 pre set levels that have absolutely no soul put into them and feel scripted. I'm not even gonna use Lucky Patcher or some APK to bypass this, because there's honestly no hope. Doesn't even include the featured made by actual people. PC demo better.

Used to be able to create your own level on this mobile version and test with any of the characters. Don't know why that has since been removed entirely. I understand not allowing user created levels but there's no reason to remove the sandbox create section of the game. This is a skeleton of what the game actually is on pc, loaded with as many ads as possible so they can make money while doing zero work on this game. Don't support that until they start valuing YOU as their customer!

Controls, performance, and everything else is great. And the ads go away if you turn on airplane mode. So why is this a 1 star? Because the lack of custom player made levels turn this game into a sad husk of it's former self. These levels are the backbone of happy wheels, and without them, the game is a sad, boring, insufferable experience.

This game is flat out terrible. First, the ads. In my couple months of owning this game, I've seen 3 unique ads. They're all the same. Then, if you're out and don't have data or something, it crashes the game when it wants to load the ad. Then, support. I've downloaded this game on and off for about a year, with 3 months break in between. When I came back after I left, nothing changed. They didn't even fix the physics to match the far superior desktop version. 1/10, wouldn't recommend.
very bad experience because in every retry there are ads and ads

Honestly a horrible game, you can't even enjoy the game, every 3 tries they throw an add, and you can't even play the game without Wifi/data because the game will just ask you to turn in back on and force you out of the game, aside from the add problems, every time your character slightly taps their head on the wall their head just randomly explodes, they randomly lose an arm or leg by slightly hitting the floor too hard

The ads normally aren't a problem when you turn off your wifi or data. But if you do this then after about 3 times of dying the game will give me the screen that basically says to help them out by turning back on the data or internet and then it will kick you from the game and make you completely restart it.

There's only a few levels for select characters made by the developers. There's no player made levels or any sort of custom levels to play. The controls are very responsive and game runs smoothly for the most part. It's loaded with a bunch of ads. The levels you can play are honestly pretty boring. The chaos in which players made in custom levels was what made it so fun and memorable.

The game is fun and all but I have some problems. First the moped couple levels are non existent, alot of the characters are missing, pogo man has like 3 levels and there's only 4 pick a character levels I've made levels before It does not take that long. Your son can't be killed. No level editor, also too many ads, no player made levels your stuck with only a few levels. If you fix this issue will give 5 stars.

Great game, but buggy! This is a classic and a really nice mobile version of the browser game. The reason I am giving it two stars is because of the bug that makes it almost unplayable. The bug is that sometimes, one of the buttons (the lean back button) has a delay in activating of around one second. This is unfortunately enough to make the game unplayable, as you are unable to manoeuvre the character properly when it matters most. If this bug were to be fixed, the game would get five!

star_2.text: The idea of Happy Wheels being on Android is a neat little concept, but the execution of it is just not what you expect like how it is on PC. First, the controls are straight up terrible. The move and jump buttons are placed differently on the sides of the screen. The second reasons are the level design and no online levels, the level design is often too trollish and confusing, and without the online levels, it just makes the game even more boring. Yeah, I wouldn't recommend this port.

I loved the game on the computer but the mobile game is absolutely awful. once you complete 4 levels the game crashes ever 40-60 seconds. there are never new levels (there are like 15 levels per character) but that doesn't matter because you can never run the app long enough to get past a single level. and to top it off it's been like 5 years and they still haven't added any scooter guy levels( yet again though doesn't matter). in summary THE GAME ISNT PLAYABLE AT ALL PLEASE FIX IT.

The entire point of happy wheels (imo) is the ability to play levels made by other players. In the mobile version, you can't. Also, the levels are extremely irritating, and the ads are insane. If you turn off the wifi, it tells you to "please support" them, which I don't really want to do, considering it's kind of a poorly made app. The flash version is 100000x better.

I love the game so much (Thx GrayStillPlays) but it sucks to play on Chromebooks. I have no access to making levels and uploading them and I can only try levels that are made from the creators of the game. It also won't let me try out other parts of the game like the bottle-flips and rope swings! Totally unfair! What's worse is I have to watch a million ads to play because if I don't keep my wifi on I get kicked out on purpose! WHY ADD A BUNCH OF ADS IF YOU CAN'T EVEN PLAY ONLINE HERE?! 2 STARS!

It was a good game a while ago but now it has adds after every couple deaths. And they removed the custom levels so you can't play other people's games/ make your own. More of a money grabbing game now. And there's only 4 levels that allow you to use any character you choose. All the characters have their own set levels. Pretty lame now if you ask me.

As you perhaps already know - support for both accessing and creating community levels is very much needed. Apart from this, Google achievements, rankings and cloud save features are a must these days in my humble opinion. You've got a solid base, which just needs expanding, when it's complete I will surely buy the ad-free version :) Edit: Furthermore, Happy Wheels isn't listed as a "game" in my device's storage settings, it looks there just like any app.

This game has not had an update in OVER A YEAR which if you've probably known that is not good for a game. The PC version was much better with player made levels and better mechanics and more character options. This version (mobile) is not that bad it just needs a LOT of work and new things. I am honestly disappointed on how this is like a downgraded version of the PC version which is understandable but still needs work.

This is a really good game, but there is only one problen that is really annoying. I don't know if anyone else had this problem, but when I play, after about 5 minutes the game asks you to put on your data connection or wifi to enable ads and there's a button that says " I'll consider it. ", when you press thag button the game goes straight out and then you have to reload it. I find that annoying because the game is basically forcing you to put on your data to watch ads.

I was surprised when I found out Happy Wheels was on the App Store... I was disappointed to find out it wasn't exactly the same Happy Wheels. It does not have any user-made levels like the online version, which is a deal-breaker for me. I even had a hard time uninstalling the app. I have never in all my life received a message telling me it failed to uninstall an app.😳 That definitely worried me. Sorry.

I have given two stars instead of one, for the sole reason that the original version of Happy Wheels for PC is a great game. However, this app is nowhere near as good. There are constant bugs, and ads will pop up every one or two deaths. It is nothing like the original Happy Wheels. The quality of this app is comparable to 75 percent of the games on the Play Store. Way too many ads, to the point where you simply cannot enjoy the game. Totaljerkface can do better than this.

I gave it two stars because yes it's happy wheels on the go, but it lacks the repeatability and fun the computer version has, and it has nothing to do with the controls. The games levels are unsatisfying and not relatable to any extent. On the pc version, everytime you play a sword throw, it was different, every single time, here, all the levels are scripted and limiting. Please add more engaging levels, such as sword throws or spike falls, because those levels are the best part of happy wheels.

It's finally Happy Wheels on Android! I've wanted to see this for years!! But with all these Android based gaming handhelds coming out in the last few years from Retroid, Anbernic, etc, the fact that this has no gamepad support is basically an immediate dealbreaker for me. I went from absolutely over the moon excited that HW was finally available for my handhelds to absolute disappointment that I couldn't really play it, at least not with the physical controls.

The game is great, if you like to watch ads, you are forced to watch ads every few attempts, try to turn off WiFi? The game closes the app whenever it tries to load an ad, meaning you either watch the ad, or restart your game every 2 minutes, its really annoying, especially when you are away from home and dont have internet and it still closes the app. The game also just randomly closes for no reason. :(

Amazing game don't get me wrong (that's why it's two instead of one star) but the issue is when you can't create levels nor play other people's levels. On computers you can. On apple products you can. But yet they don't add it on the Google play store. The amount of ads is also absurd every time I did on a level a ad plays and it helps take the fun out of it.

The game itself is for sure amazing but the ads get crazy and once I turn off my data it kicks me out automatically. I don't get the point of it if u can't play it offline. If you wanna please a customer at least let them have fun cuz some of us can't afford WiFi or Data you gotta do something to have a offline version to customize maps again like old times. Let creativity spread throughout the game itself.

I love Happy Wheels. The gameplay is fun, but the constant "turn on mobile data or wifi" and then crashing the app is extremely frustrating. I regularly go into areas where service is not available, so this gets very, very annoying. The lack of a level creator and player-made levels leaves a lot to be desired. "There's a slight possibilty that someone will make something inappropriate and post it online? Ok, we'll just remove what made this game great in the first place."

This game is fun on a computer. However, the mobile version is not fun. Your forced to do boring levels instead of choosing levels made by people. Also, I get ads almost every time I die. The controls are ok, the graphics are high resolution but overall, I'm disappointed of how much worse this is compared to the computer happy wheels.

The game itself is pretty fun and has most of the features you would want in a mobile version of the Happy Wheels. What kills it for me is the ads that never give the option to skip. I've been stuck in multiple demos for games for several MINUTES that won't let me exit out and back to the game. Which is a bummer because I've loved PC HW for years and was excited about having the whole game simply in my pocket. Please do some ad controll.

This game simply PALES in comparison to the original. No user made levels, an absurd amount of ads and the fact that if you turn off wifi the developers BEG you to turn it on again, as soon as you click "i'll consider it" the game crashes, as if giving you a virtual middle finger. I could have forgiven the shortcomings if it wasn't for the tiny amount of content, so 2 stars it is.

The whole thing that made Happy wheels appealing was the online level selection. The mobile version has only offline levels. Also, every 2 or 3 deaths, the game prompts you to turn on wifi so it can send you ads, and then it immediately closes on its own. So basically you have to restart the game every 2 or 3 deaths if you play offline.

star_3.text: This game is okay honestly. It's a pretty good concept but there's way too many ads. it's also hard to get past level 2 or 3 on any of the characters bc the levels are way too hard and the characters die super easily. Some of the characters are also way too sensitive or slow like they'll get 2 legs snapped off because they fell like 3 feet. it's mid compared to how it used to be.
one of my fav games but still cant play it well on my PC as the controls are really difficult and unstable to handle..
overall a fun game needs more levels but it kept freezing and showing me a wall that lowers it to three stars but overall the game is pretty good needs a little fix with the bugs

This game has a really bad ad problem, to the point where leaving and restarting the game is faster than watching them. It also hasn't been updated in 2 years as of now,Pogo Guy's level set is unfinished, as are the Pick a Character levels, and the Moped Couple doesn't even have any dedicated levels. The game is otherwise pretty fun, although it's brutally difficult. The game is great, just add more content and only put ads starting the level/after wins.
Good game but has a really annoying glitch where the screen locks and has no option to go back

The ads are very bad. It's not because there's a lot, that's fine, but because the ads are inappropriate and I can't change them. I don't want to see porn on the top of my screen. My little brother saw that. No it is not ad personalization, I turned it off. Not only that the replay option doesn't work very well, i win the round and when I replay it the character dies for some reason. Overall the gameplay is really fun but they should fix the bugs and the ads.

Now, I've always loved happy wheels. Like for eons. And this is a great attempt at a mobile version. But it's missing oh so much. For example, I dont feel it would be to challenging to add user made levels such as rope swings and ball throws and stuff of that nature. Yet it doesn't have it. And that right there is a big reason as to why i give this a 3. You guys did a great job but i really do wish there was more to it

Really fun gameplay and has lots of potential to be fully good game for the store alone but is filled with adds every couple deaths . once I had to watch the same add 12 times and the game kicks you out with internet off . (overall really good game but to many adds)

The biggest issue that holds Happy Wheels back from being the great game that it could be is that so much of the levels are filled with obstacles that boil down to: wait, wait, wait, ok go, STOP, wait, wait, wait, wait, ok go, STOP, over and over and over again. And, on top of that, dying is so easy, and there's no checkpoints. Even one checkpoint near the middle of each level would suffice. And make it harder for your head to explode, because you can tap your head against the wall and die.

I would rate i 5 stars. But since the ads won't bother me, the player made levels are not here yet. And also how it's very different from the flash version. But the game is smooth. But the controls are hard to use on some chatacters. But i just wanted you to make a player made level to this game like the ones on iphone and flash version. Because im bored of only playing creator made levels... I also hate ads sometimes if im offline playing outside of my house when it's meant to be played offline

I really love the game and it gives me some serious nostalgia but there are 2 big problems 1. The constant ads And most importantly 2.where are the online levels. They made the main part of the game non existent . When I saw that Happy wheels was released for Android I was so happy and nostalgic but when I opened it I was instantly a bit disappointed. I mean let's be honest we've been waiting for the game to come out for Android for 5 years and this is what we get !?

Great that it's finally Happy Wheels for Android! Funny physics, hilarious characters and the generally dark humour surrounding the gore makes it fun to play. But that's up to a point when the hit or miss physics and hugely challenging levels frustrate, rather than entertain. I love an element of challenge, but not the replaying of a level for the umpteenth time. It could do with NPC's, some of the original PC levels and characters and a level editor akin to the one for iOS.

I Love this game but you have not updated it in a long time and I would give you five stars but I'm giving you three unless you add more characters and levels. I have played this game for a long time and I've deleted it and redownloaded it multiple times and it's still the same thing over and over again. so please also add fan-made levels because I'll make the game a lot more fun and please don't push it till 2026 please

It's amazing the game finally got released on android (almost 5 years later after iOS). From my experience, it just works, the controls aren't bad and the game runs smoothly (and doesn't crash). What sucks is that you can't play the game offline so you're constantly bombarded with ads (unless you want so spend your hard earned money). Also, the absence of community maps and map editor is like the game is missing half of its soul. The maps included kinda suck, tbh.

Now look, I think this is a great adaptation of the webgame. But GOD, the replay mechanic has to be one of the worst in a game. It doesn't show a video of you playing the level, it just reloads the level and it repeats the moves you just did. And if you've beat the level, the replay definitely is NOT gonna show you that. Would give a four, but, this is just bugging me.

The game is good except for the following: Too many unskippable ads! The ads are horrible and they show out of nowhere! The audio! Randomly the audio will cut off our of nowhere! Lag! Lag spikes are noticable and frequent! The good parts of the game? The controls are good and the game is actually kinda good with a lot of levels. Fix what's wrong with it and I'll probably move it to a 4 star review.

The port is great and all but there are some issue i have with it Firstly the crashes that becomes more frequent as you play the game more Secondly the fact that there is no level editor maybe you could add it and if any of us wanted to test our level you need to watch a short skippable ads Thirdly most of the levels are only playable with specific character and yes i am aware that there are levels where you can choose whatever character you want but there are only three of them

No hate but the game is less fun now. I don't hate happy wheels but you literally can't make levels or play online ones. The only levels you can play are developer generated levels which takes the fun out of it. And it has so much more ads than any version of this game. Too many ads and too less features. Too dissatisfied with this version.

Game's great. Offline experience is intrusive and frustrating. The game interupts me to rate the game every 3-4 deaths. The pop-up asks to go online and rate the game, or purchase the no ads feature. Since I was unable to connect in any capacity I was forced to tap on the only option, which forces the game to close and reset.

I Guess This Game Is Fun. Although it's Really Annoying How Easy It Is To Die. I Feel Like If I Just Hit The Wall Lightly, I Die. Also The Amount Of Advertisements That Pop Up, Are Even Scary. I Can't Skip The Ads, Exit Them, Or Do Anything. Plus, I Was Pretty Sure I Could Make Levels, I Guess It's Not Here, That All I'm Complaining About, The Levels Are Pretty Fun, I Would Consider Downloading This

star_4.text: Happy wheels is a great game, but one piece of criticism, there needs to way more levels for the levels with multiple characters, and the way you unlock the 4th one is so bad. The effective shopper levers are unnecessarily hard, and the controls are bad. also the slightest amount of pressure on her head and her head explodes, making me restart the level, and the levels need to either be made shorter, or easier and the groceries get in the way, and she makes the game actually unenjoyable

Classic game and still fun to this day, but a few issues. Not all the characters are here, and there's no custom levels which is a staple of happy wheels, also controls can be a bit wierd by default, like with the pogo guy where the jump and the tilt work well together, but both of them are on the left making it extremely hard to use, this can be changed in options though. Overall, its still enjoyable and theres no problems with microtransactions or being forced to be online.

The game is very fun but can be very annoying at certain times it does have ads but I just go on airplane mode to not see it and levels can be very difficult before playing this game also beware it is extremely gory and bloody you can turn the blood and gore off in settings but it will make it a bit harder because you can't tell if you're character is injured when it is on and It looks strange so I don't recommend playing it if your sensitive to blood.
They should enable the option to play levels created by other players, and perhaps the option to create levels via mobile phone as well. Aside from that, it's very faithful to the computer version.

As it is right now, it's great, but could greatly benefit from less ads as well as the inclusion of user-made levels since that was a major part of the original game. Also, an option to use an external controller would be great as the touchscreen controls are somewhat limiting as to what you can and cannot do. Lastly, please add the rest of the playable characters to the game. Other than that, it's a pretty great and pretty faithful mobile port of this childhood favourite of mine.

Happy Wheels is a true classic. I can't recommend playing it enough. But for a game where you die *a lot*, having ads after every other death is pretty distracting. Given that it used to be free to play (and I don't see an awful lot of changes or new content) this is the only major downside to this game. The last update as of now was in January of this year and includes the line "more fixes coming soon" - the promise of an update is not an update...

It is actually happy wheels! I thought the reviews were fake but I was wrong. Nice surprise. It doesn't have user made levels which needs to be added. It also gives you ads after every game and if you turn off data it just asks you to turn them on, forcing you to wait 5 seconds. It is fun though, and it's always been satisfying. I do recommend if your not looking for something special.

I really like the game, it runs smoothly and is detailed but my problem is the lack of content. Unlike the web version of happy wheels you can't play levels made by other people and you can only play the ones given to you. Some characters like the minecart guy and the lawnmower man are missing in this version. The level editor is also missing some features from the web version. Other than this the game is great and I hope to see it update soon.

This game is really fun and lives up to my expectations. They do update the game with more characters and levels. The only reason I didn't give it a 5 star review is because when you don't have WiFi every few goes it asks you to switch on the WiFi and then you have the only option to press "I'll consider it" and takes you off the game back to the apps.

I really enjoy this game, it's a great time killer and can be played anytime, anywhere. I've noticed though that sometimes my characters vehicle gets stuck in a wall but it doesn't bother me too much, and i feel the adds are a little to frequent, but I understand you guys need money, thats all for now, thanks for the great game.

This is a fun game actually, and i can't believe it's on android now, but uhm! It needs more upgrade or fixed like the replay button, the replay button needs a fast motion and slow motion, and i hope you fix it, and many people will play if you add some other levels like random levels like in the PC. Btw! I love this game i'll rate it 5 star when you update it with all that i've said.

Time to re review: I gave five stars the first time, but to be honest I find too frustrating the fact that there are no check points at all and, as Im more of a casual gamer, it got at a point which made me think "why am I doing this?". Watching yr character dying it superfan at first but then when it happens 30 times in a row U want to skip it as fast as U can but U have to wait more or less 3 second after U die, to do that. And that frustrates me as well

Hey guys live the game can wait for an update that has the custom levels like on iOS and please I beg you to let irresponsible dad's son die because that's the joys of happy wheels apart from that I love this game I've play it on PC iOS and Android now. Can't wait for future updates and yeah the bug hasn't been fix (that's why it's not 5 stars yet) but hey I'm sure you will fix it! Also could you guys add in custom controls layout because the buttons are just to small. Thank you!

Super fun game, easy controls, nice levels, but its nothing like the PC version. They don't give you any fan made levels, just ones they made and you have to beat them with that specific character, which kind of sucks. If they made it more like the PC version this game would be so much better.

I used to play this game on iOS a few years ago and I heard it dropped on Android so I decided to check it out. Very happy that they finally added more levels for the game and hopefully continue its development. They are kinda aggressive with ads but I guess rightfully so. Fantastic game if your looking for a challenge.

Great!!! I really recommend the game. It's challenging but fun at the same time. I give 4 stars because I would love to see it be improved. I would like to make my own levels and play them. I would also like to see a player made level section like what's on the desktop version. (P.S just so everyone knows this is not a fake review, the game I am talking about is Happy Wheels)

Well, happy wheels is a good game, and this does it justice But, I have two big issues, one I kinda understand though. First, why can't you see the bastard Billy die? I get it, like, children murder is bad, but it's a 2d side scroller, c'mon! The other thing is, why no user made levels? It'll be fun! Think about it, sword throws, spike falls, all that! oh and why don't the characters bleed?

Haha it's actually quite fun to play it and yes it's addictive sometimes,but most of the time it makes u angry for failing again and again but it's quite challenging. I'm also happy that it has less adds than other games like this. And of course the brutal kills are the most important part of this game which makes it "Happy Wheels". I'm gonna give four stars cz there's a bit of an issue in the controls which bothers me but it might not bother others so yeah. It's worth it .

Indeed a great game. There are many reasons I love this game: The theme, the gameplay, the unique characters, the extraordinary levels and of course the bloody thought. As we know it's originally a windows game, this mobile version is going through updates. I like that the developers keep adding new characters and levels. Honestly speaking this is one of my favourite games.

So here it is, the classic "Happy Wheels" game, well this game is definitely fun, but there are some things missing like levels created by players, these pre generated levels are fun too but the real fun is playing player made levels, it's pure chaos, and also the controls are not customisable, that's bad, because I like to keep my movement buttons in the left but here it's in right, there's one setting where we can turn off gore, it's good for creators, overall a fun chaotic game!

star_5.text: This is a very fun game, the levels are difficult but not TOO difficult which makes it fun. And it's the funniest thing to see how many ways your character can die. Honestly there isn't anything much wrong with it. And the adds aren't that annoying, they only pop up once your character dies or if you finish the level which is very good, so it doesn't seem like your forced to buy the add remover. Overall 5 stars.

As with many users, I too played this on PC and was so excited when I heard it was going mobile....then was sad to see it was only for iPhone for the longest time..... BUT NO MORE!!! One of the best time killers in the entire human existence is available pretty much EVERYWHERE!!!! And for EVERYONE to thoroughly enjoy!!! I'm so happy with the controls, gameplay, graphics, choices of multiple characters and each one's corresponding courses, that this is the only game I will ever truly need!!!

This game is amazing. The physics are great, the courses are fun, and the deaths are hilarious. I have always loved this game but was sad that it wasn't available on Google Play, but my dream did eventually come true. The only thing that I don't like is that Billy/Timmy/Jimmy (or whatever you call him) has an indestructible body and it can't explode like the other characters, but still, it's a great game, and the fact that Billy/Timmy/Jimmy can't die isn't a huge deal.

Recently found out from the Flash version of the game that it had been added on Google Play, so I decided I would try it. Very well-made, I believe the mobile version runs way smoother compared to the original Flash. The only problem I have is that the controls seem a bit different; such as the Pogo guy, you can't really roll as you could on the Flash game. Other than that, wonderful game.

Fasten your seatbelts, cuz' you are in for one bumpy ride! With the same feeling and game physics like the original Flash/html5 video game, this has all the potential for non-PC (or Mac, if you didn't wear a helmet) players to kick back, relax and enjoy a nice stroll in nature. I hope this edition will continue to be supported with more characters, more levels and more gore! I have currently found zero bugs in the game 5/5 Stars

I love this and the only thing I wish it had is player created maps, heres hoping it's coming soon. I only noticed this after I read the "tell us more" part of the review but this game opens and run while on airplane mode. 9.9/10 it will be a 10 if we get player created maps but until then this is a lot of fun for down time at work.

I absolutely love this game! I remember when it was first available only on IPhone, then became available on Android. Okay, this mobile version doesn't allow the ability to play other peoples levels. But, at the end of the day, it still gives the option to create your own levels! The levels are hard, which gives me thrills of anger and determination to complete each one (I'm not an easy quitter)! And, coincidentally, the playable characters are my favourites! A very good game indeed! I love it!

This game is hard, and I mean HARD, I originally got it with the intention of it being a relaxing and fun little game, but instead found myself in a crazy, nerve wracking, sweat breaking nightmare, where beating a single level is a struggle. I've played the original, this android version ain't the same thing, not that it's a bad game, the physics work, no lag, no glitches, matter of fact it's really well made! Here's hoping we get to see user-made levels and the level editor in the future!

This game's a classic! It's nice being able to play this again since Flash is basically dead. The controls feel a bit awkward at first but you'll quickly get the hang of it. TotalJerkFace is also being really fair with the ads, which is good considering most mobile games are ad and in-app purchase boxes. The only purchase you can make is to remove ads, and that's good. There are no limited lives or energy or anything like that. Thanks, TotalJerkFace.

I don't even know how to describe this master piece. I understand the PC version is better but this is probably the best mobile game I've ever played. It's like you're in an open world, kind of, but 2D. I mean how free can you be in a game about racing to the finish? The funny moments this game has makes me play for days on end, even to the point I play every level to see how I can die in inventive ways! If ads bother you, play offline, and if you do play offline and this pop up appears, restart

Great game. Some people are leaving 1 star reviews after being angry because they find the game too hard. That's kinda the point of the game, it's not stupidly hard, it's challenging. Not sure if this is still in Beta or not but I'm sure the user generated levels will become an option later on. For me I'm finding the levels enjoyable the the game is all around good.

This is honestly the best game you can get on mobile, as a mobile game I understand how you need ads to make a profit, and instead of an ad every 15 seconds, you get one every so often, you also have the option to turn off gore and blood, but it's honestly better with it, there is some pretty hard levels and some different characters to choose from but even more will be added in the future. For a good time waster, get this game.

It's so nice to see Happy Wheels finally on android. I was thinking about this after I found out the removal of Flash player. Anyways, great job with the game, especially with the more detailed character selection (more of that please). The physics is perfect as the flash version, please ad an "Option" about switching the control sides, I get it that it's the keyboard layout but mobile is kind of different with that part. That's all for now, we'll be waiting for the update!

This game is fun, If you just ignore the fact that there is no level editor or user made levels, it will make this game actually fun although it is quite difficult as it requires multiple attempts and timing to actually complete a level without dying. Although it still has some minor details missing that are present in iOS but still. best game (Note:this is not spam as I am talking about Happy Wheels)

It is a good game all is good on it I love it like the gore, the physic, and all. And the ad is annoying but WHY when offline you get a 15 sec fake ad that goes 15, 14, 13... But the game is fun and lots of level they need more tho. And need online level made map and more. I think that the model is lighter but yeah fun playing and you should try it.

I've played this game ever since I was a child, I still love it can't get enough of it. I wish it was still on pc. Please please developers look at this and add more levels! please!!! Or add a creation option :') I've already completed it and I'm wishing for more... I miss the good old days. All the OG levels. Happy trails, that one with the infinite staircase, ect. Please, go back to how it was :') Or close x')

A good fun game for time pass . Every level cames with a new challenge. You have to understand the levels at first then think about to complete it. You have many characters to play this game. At all you will no bore. But some levels can irritated you for it's toughness. At all it is a very fun game.

This game is the best, first off, all of the characters move perfectly and nothing is flawed at all, secondly, I know a spike wouldn't easily penetrate the human skull but it's just a game. Third, the physics in this game is absolutely satisfying and fantastic, it is challenging. I would give it a six, but I can't. Play it.

The fact that happy wheels has a mobile port in the first place is already a plus, and it's actually good!!! Once you realise and acknowledge that there are no user levels and you just play the actual level's, you realize that this game is actually really good. But, the difficulty and the unnecessary extra ways can't be ignored. even after like 50 attempts i can't beat a single level. BALANCE THE DIFFICULTY AND MAKE IT MORE CONSISTENT!!!! And could u make a paid version that has the user levels?

This game is absolutely One of the best games you can think of when u get bored. But the thing is The PC Version gets to browse level made by people while in mobile you just play level to beat the game. It is still fun but Last update was November 3 2023 which is a long time ago and 2 characters don't have much levels like pogo. The moped couple doesn't even have a level but playing the character is amazingly good and fun even though it doesn't have any level for moped couple. I still enjoy it.
